title: CHILDREN’S OUTPATIENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: BARBARA ROSS BUILDING CHILDREN’S OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, family, and group therapy, case management, skills training, and parent education. Offers wraparound services to coordinate care for youth and families with high needs, including those in IHN/OHP and multiple systems. 4185 SW Research Way Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Ages 18 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 766-6835 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 766-6767 Main phone Main phone (541) 766-6835 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. Payment plans are available. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Case/Care Management * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Family Counseling Group Counseling * Adolescents Group Counseling * Children Parenting Skills Classes Social Skills Training Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - SCHOOL-BASED MENTAL HEALTH PROGRAM REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DIVERSITY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BARBARA ROSS BUILDING
